overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 141 条，入选 3 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 141 previously displayed items excluded, and 3 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary_zh: 重点：Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.summary_en: Focus: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

items.title: Building the most AI-pilled engineering team in the world | Fiona Fung (Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork Teams)

items.summary_en: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Building the most AI-pilled engineering team in the world | Fiona Fung (Manager of the Claude Code and Cowork Teams)', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.
